testcase.name: test_empty_input_just_eof
testcase.failure: tests/test_lexer.py:14: in test_empty_input_just_eof assert len(toks) == 1 E assert 0 == 1 E + where 0 = len([])

testcase.name: test_let_x_eq_1_plus_2

failure.message:
AssertionError: assert [] == ['KEYWORD', '...'NUMBER', ...]
Right contains 8 more items, first extra item: 'KEYWORD' Use -v to get more diff

testcase.failure: tests/test_lexer.py:20: in test_let_x_eq_1_plus_2 assert kinds(toks) == [ E AssertionError: assert [] == ['KEYWORD', '...'NUMBER', ...] E E Right contains 8 more items, first extra item: 'KEYWORD' E Use -v to get more diff

testcase.name: test_keywords_vs_identifiers

failure.message:
AssertionError: assert [] == ['KEYWORD', '...ORD', 'IDENT']
Right contains 4 more items, first extra item: 'KEYWORD' Use -v to get more diff

testcase.failure: tests/test_lexer.py:28: in test_keywords_vs_identifiers assert kinds(toks)[:4] == ["KEYWORD", "IDENT", "KEYWORD", "IDENT"] E AssertionError: assert [] == ['KEYWORD', '...ORD', 'IDENT'] E E Right contains 4 more items, first extra item: 'KEYWORD' E Use -v to get more diff

testcase.name: test_multi_char_punct

failure.message:
AssertionError: assert [] == ['==', '!=', ...', '&&', '||']
Right contains 6 more items, first extra item: '==' Use -v to get more diff

testcase.failure: tests/test_lexer.py:37: in test_multi_char_punct assert [t.value for t in toks if t.kind == "PUNCT"] == ["==", "!=", "<=", ">=", "&&", "||"] E AssertionError: assert [] == ['==', '!=', ...', '&&', '||'] E E Right contains 6 more items, first extra item: '==' E Use -v to get more diff

testcase.name: test_single_char_punct_after_multi

failure.message: assert False + where False = any(<generator object test_single_char_punct_after_multi.<locals>.<genexpr> at 0x10ae431d0>)

testcase.failure: tests/test_lexer.py:46: in test_single_char_punct_after_multi assert any(t.kind == "PUNCT" and t.value == "=" for t in toks) E assert False E + where False = any(<generator object test_single_char_punct_after_multi.<locals>.<genexpr> at 0x10ae431d0>)

testcase.name: test_string_escapes

failure.message: IndexError: list index out of range

testcase.failure: tests/test_lexer.py:51: in test_string_escapes s = [t for t in toks if t.kind == "STRING"][0] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E IndexError: list index out of range

testcase.name: test_comments_stripped

failure.message:
AssertionError: assert [] == ['x', 'y']
Right contains 2 more items, first extra item: 'x' Use -v to get more diff

testcase.failure: tests/test_lexer.py:59: in test_comments_stripped assert idents == ["x", "y"] E AssertionError: assert [] == ['x', 'y'] E E Right contains 2 more items, first extra item: 'x' E Use -v to get more diff

testcase.name: test_line_col_tracking

failure.message: IndexError: list index out of range

testcase.failure: tests/test_lexer.py:64: in test_line_col_tracking let_tok = toks[0] ^^^^^^^ E IndexError: list index out of range

testcase.name: test_unknown_char_errors
testcase.failure: tests/test_lexer.py:72: in test_unknown_char_errors with pytest.raises(Exception) as exc: ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E Failed: DID NOT RAISE <class 'Exception'>

testcase.name: test_number_and_float

failure.message: IndexError: list index out of range

testcase.failure: tests/test_lexer.py:84: in test_number_and_float assert nums[0] == 42.0 ^^^^^^^ E IndexError: list index out of range

testcase.name: test_eof_only_once

failure.message: assert 0 == 1 + where 0 = sum(<generator object test_eof_only_once.<locals>.<genexpr> at 0x10ae43d30>)

testcase.failure: tests/test_lexer.py:90: in test_eof_only_once assert sum(1 for t in toks if t.kind == "EOF") == 1 E assert 0 == 1 E + where 0 = sum(<generator object test_eof_only_once.<locals>.<genexpr> at 0x10ae43d30>)
